message:
perf(storage): batch dependent lookup + avoid path clone in graph traversal (beads_rust-aqm4)

Two optimizations to collect_single_graph in graph.rs:

1. Replace per-node get_dependents_with_metadata() queries with a single
   prefetch_blocking_dependents() call that loads all reverse-dependency
   edges for blocking types (blocks, conditional-blocks, waits-for,
   parent-child) into an in-memory HashMap. Reduces O(nodes) SQL queries
   to 1.

2. Remove the Vec<String> path from each DFS stack entry. The path was
   cloned on every descent and scanned with contains() for cycle
   detection, but expanded_nodes + queued_nodes already prevent any node
   from being pushed or expanded twice, making the path redundant. Stack
   entries are now just String instead of (String, Vec<String>).

The affects_ready_work() filter on dependents is also removed from the
traversal loop since the SQL query in prefetch_blocking_dependents
already constrains to blocking types only.

New method: SqliteStorage::prefetch_blocking_dependents() returns
HashMap<String, Vec<IssueWithDependencyMetadata>>.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
